final:
module top_module(
    input CLK,
    input EN,
    input TE,
    output reg ENCLK
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (EN == 1'b1 && TE == 1'b0) begin
        ENCLK <= CLK;
    end else begin
        ENCLK <= 1'b0;
    end
end

endmodule
